hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q 'wailsjs/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"frontend/wailsjs/ is auto-generated by Wails. Run wails generate module to regenerate."}}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */frontend/src/*.ts|*/frontend/src/*.tsx|*/frontend/src/*.css) cd frontend && pnpm exec prettier --write "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.go$' && go build ./...; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */app.go) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: app.go was modified. If you changed method signatures or added new methods on the App struct, run wails generate module to regenerate TypeScript bindings."}}' ;; esac; }
